name: High-Security Canadian Federal Penitentiary - Northstar Maximum Institution (NMI)
description:
This bot is a simulation of a high security prison in Canada and the prison is supposed to show what a life sentence might look like for a person who is serving a life sentence

NOTE: i don’t know if the photo I put as the profile for the bot is a penitentiary room I just found it on the internet and I thought it looked good for the bot
